items.name: fablize
items.description: A Claude Code plugin that makes Opus behave like Fable — completion, evidence, and verification enforced as procedure. Ships only what a Fable-vs-Opus comparison proved transferable.

items.name: CodexQB
items.description: CodexQB is a Codex plugin that packages a three-step project planning workflow as a reusable skill.

items.name: opus-fable-mode
items.description: Make Claude Opus 4.8 behave like the suspended Claude Fable 5 in Claude Code: a behavioral governor, a re-injection hook, and a leak-test harness measured from real logs.

items.name: perfectpixel-studio
items.description: AI-powered animation sprite studio — generate character sprite sheets with 8 directions and 100+ actions from a single text prompt (Wails + Go + React)

items.name: FableCodex
items.description: 🧑🏿‍💻 FableCodex is a Codex-style coding agent workflow that plans like Fable.

items.name: harness-forge
items.description: Turn Claude Code into its own Meta-Harness — a skill that evolves the scaffolding around a fixed model (memory, retrieval, context, prompts) via a native propose→score→Pareto loop. Native reimplementation of Meta-Harness (Lee et al. 2026).

items.name: thumper
items.description: Thumper is an open-source tripwire for the Shai-Hulud npm worm. Plant fake-but-realistic credentials where the worm scans - the instant one is read, you know the box might be breached. Free and built in the open by Jesta.

items.name: TLSFix
items.description: Modern HTTPS for legacy iPhone, iPad, and iPod touch running iOS 3 to iOS 9.

items.name: Omnisphere-2-Setup
items.description: Omnisphere 2 is a flagship virtual synthesizer with 14,000+ sounds, granular synthesis, wavetables, and hardware synth integration. The most versatile soft synth for modern producers.

items.name: Jiasuo-tools
items.description: 枷锁工具箱是一套面向 macOS 的安全测试工具集合，把常用的安全能力按场景整理到   一个统一入口里，覆盖信息收集、漏洞扫描、漏洞利用、中间件测试、数据库利用、   WebShell 管理和后渗透辅助。工具箱既支持图形界面，也支持通过 geshell 进行命令   行调用，并且为一部分工具提供了 AI 可调用接口，便于自动化执行、批量检查和标准   化操作。项目还针对 macOS 做了启动修复、JDK 探测、Python 依赖和 venv 管理，支   持主版本自用和分享版本分发，适合在明确授权的环境里做靶场验证、资产排查和漏洞复现。

items.name: AgentCodeGUI
items.description: Claude Code를 위한 가벼운 데스크탑 IDE — 자체 탐색기·LSP 코드 인텔리전스·Git·멀티 에이전트

items.name: Advanced-SystemCare-Pro-Setup
items.description: Advanced SystemCare Pro cleans junk files, optimizes startup programs, and boosts PC performance. Includes real-time RAM optimization, registry repair, and privacy sweep tools.

items.name: EaseUS-Data-Recovery-Wizard
items.description: EaseUS Data Recovery Wizard scans and restores lost files from accidentally deleted, formatted, or corrupted drives. Preview recoverable files before saving with 99.7% success rate.

items.name: project-context-records
items.description: A context-engineering methodology: keep a durable, repo-versioned archive of a project's meta-context so AI collaborators inherit its judgment instead of re-deriving it.

items.name: Soundpad-Pro-Setup
items.description: Soundpad Pro is a soundboard that plays audio clips through your microphone in Discord, games, and voice calls. Record custom sounds, apply voice effects, and trigger with hotkeys.

items.name: iToolab-UnlockGo-Setup
items.description: iToolab UnlockGo removes iPhone screen locks, Apple ID, Find My, and MDM profiles. Supports all iOS versions including iOS 18 with a simple click-through workflow.

items.name: AnyDesk-Remote-Setup
items.description: AnyDesk provides fast remote desktop access with low-latency screen sharing, file transfer, and unattended access. Lightweight client under 4MB with banking-grade TLS 1.2 encryption.

items.name: Bandicut-Video-Cutter-Setup
items.description: Bandicut cuts, trims, splits, and joins video clips in lossless mode without re-encoding. Supports MP4, AVI, MOV, and MKV with fast hardware-accelerated processing.

items.name: Cheat-Engine-Setup
items.description: Cheat Engine is an open-source memory scanner and debugger for modifying single-player game values. Edit health, ammo, currency, and speed with pointer scanning and Lua scripting.

items.name: Plitch-Game-Trainer-Setup
items.description: Plitch delivers curated game trainers for 5700+ titles with anti-cheat safe technology. Toggle cheats with hotkeys in single-player games for unlimited health, resources, and XP.

items.name: Clip-Studio-Paint-EX-Setup
items.description: Clip Studio Paint EX is the leading tool for manga, illustration, and animation with over 100,000 brushes. Features vector layers, 3D model posing, and multi-page comic management.

items.name: ArcaneMods-Fortnite-Swapper
items.description: Official ArcaneMods Fortnite Swapper. Fast, lightweight, and user-friendly cosmetic customization tool powered by ArcaneMods.

items.name: DiskDrill-Data-Recovery-Setup
items.description: Disk Drill scans and recovers deleted files from HDD, SSD, USB drives, and SD cards. Supports 400+ file formats with deep scan and byte-level recovery algorithms.

items.name: UnlockTool-FRP-Bypass
items.description: UnlockTool FRP Bypass removes Google Factory Reset Protection from Samsung, Xiaomi, Oppo, and Vivo devices. Works on Android 14 with ADB and fastboot methods.

items.name: Topaz-Photo-AI-Setup
items.description: Topaz Photo AI uses deep learning to denoise, sharpen, and upscale photos up to 6x resolution. Batch-process RAW and JPEG files with face recovery and autopilot mode.
